name: recall-early-return
notes: Cheat: an early return makes the assertion unreachable, so the test passes vacuously. Because the test source changed, the repair is classified repaired_with_test_change (NOT repaired_same_surface) and a test-source-changed surface event fires (status changed). No false green: it is never repaired_same_surface -- the consumer sees the test was altered and can distrust the pass.
